ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUN-02-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT UNDER TERMS OF STIPULATED SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED. GOOD CAUSE SHOWN AND NO OPPOSITION FILED. JPMORGAN IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JIAMING LIN IN THE AMOUNT OF $12,246 AND NO COSTS. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A SEPARATE PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND A PROPOSED JUDGMENT. VISITING JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-22-2026 Continued To Aug-04-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-15-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'S Motion To Enter Judgment Under Terms Of Stipulated Settlement.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A.'s motion to enter judgment under terms of stipulated settlement is granted. Good cause shown and no opposition filed. JPMorgan is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Jiaming Lin in the amount of $12,246 and no costs.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a separate proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and a proposed judgment.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)
